discovery.note: The left nav reveals a group's topics only when you are on a page within that group. Visit one seed page per group, then read the nav links. (If all topics are visible at once, still list one seed per group.)
discovery.topicSelector: left-nav links under the open section (level 2); href gives the real slug

extract.accessGatedSentinel: the exact text shown when content is locked, or null if none
